body.title: Per-turn online accretion — write relationship updates into the facia subtree
body.result: 993a4461 — Per-turn online accretion. New module wild_igor/igor/tools/pr_accretion.py with pr_accrete + pr_accrete_exchange + pr_accrete_marker + pr_accrete_commitment + detect_marker + pr_recent_accretions. Memory shape: gist+verbatim split (Fuzzy Trace Theory) — narrative is ≤240 char summary, metadata holds full untruncated user_text and igor_reply. Integration at end of _process_inner gated on same conditions as frame push. Marker detection conservative (narrow phrase list) to avoid noise. Forensic log at logs/pr_accretion.log. 8 new tests including credential-scrubber edge case (x*5000 gets redacted by Igor's security — switched to repeated sentences). 2000 total pass, zero regressions. Ready for T-pr-consolidation (walk accretions, cluster, integrate).
body.description:
Every Akien-turn writes relationship-level observations into the Akien facia's subtree. Online accretion — fast, noisy, low-latency. Consolidation (T-pr-consolidation) cleans it up offline.

WHAT GETS ACCRETED PER TURN:
- Exchange snippet (verbatim user input, leveraging verbatim_source from f0ad6dab)
- Detected commitment if user asked Igor to do/look/check something (hooks into reply-obligation-fork goals)
- Emotional register observation if milieu shifted meaningfully
- Explicit 'this matters' markers ('remember', 'important', 'don't forget')
- Decisions made (hooks into decision_manager.py)
- New shared vocabulary / coined terms (harder, maybe Hebbian cluster detection)

IMPLEMENTATION: new module wild_igor/igor/tools/pr_accretion.py with pr_accrete(facia_id, content_type, content, metadata). Called from _process_inner after reply composition. Writes a new memory (type=EPISODIC or EXPERIENTIAL) with pr_facia_id in its metadata pointing at the relationship facia. Also updates the facia's last_activity_ts.

DEPENDS ON: T-pr-schema-seed, T-pr-load-as-primary-attractor.

DOES NOT: consolidate (T-pr-consolidation), do Hebbian clustering (that's in consolidation pass), compute weight deltas (T-pr-investment-weight-propagation).

TESTS: pr_accrete writes a memory with correct pr_facia_id linkage. last_activity_ts updates. Multiple accretions in a turn cluster correctly. Exchanges are retrievable via pr_facia_id filter.

INERTIA: MEDIUM. tools/ (new module, LOW) + main.py integration point (MEDIUM).
